artifact_refs.description: Executable working notebook used to assemble the Predict Future Sales TC1 human baseline.
Run-level provenance metadata for the bank-id human baseline.
Maps each selected bank action to the notebook section that supports it.
Author notes for the Predict Future Sales human baseline.

notes: Re-authored TC1 human baseline against the current Predict Future Sales action bank using collected Kaggle notebooks as evidence. Selected every good bank row with clear official-only notebook support and omitted frequent notebook steps that the current bank intentionally leaves out, such as full grid completion and richer grouped-history families.
